transport.environment_policy: native runtime allowlist; no provider API keys inherited

paraphrased_evidence.A: Forceful exposition gains texture from domestic scenes and simple analogies, but repeated assurances, rhetorical questions, and restated claims make the latter half drag; the bullet recap dissipates the promised transition.
paraphrased_evidence.B: Concrete scenes and accessible analogies enliven a heavily segmented argument, yet its recurring premise, escalating promises, and terminal summary create fatigue and weaken forward pull.

parsed.generic_mechanism: Because the chapters are textually identical, the same balance of concrete illustration and repeated persuasion governs every craft dimension; no mechanism produces a comparative difference.
